calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Meredith for Grady Lovett (Petitioner). Princess Green (Powers of Attorney for Healthcare for Grady Lovett). Stefanie Martin for and with Sherlyn Brown (Respondent).

Mr. Meredith reported that Mr. Lovett is currently in VA Hospital. The Court expressed its disappointment in Ms. Martin not providing a copy of the Declaration of Grady Lovett to Mr. Meredith prior to this hearing. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the need of a Restraining Order. Mr. Meredith agreed that with Mr. Lovett in a facility, the issue is moot. Matter is dismissed as moot without prejudice to filing of other proceedings.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sonia Wong CSR #11288. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
